current.title:
Analyze the entire codebase, dev, build, production, github repo and then Kindly implement the following. In all the pages, the header and footer should be same. Also kindly verify whether you have done everything or not. Don't do anything extra on your own. After implementing all these, npm run dev should show all these. Do what I said below, don't edit anything on your own, or don't make any changes on your own: 

1. The footer hyperlink words "About Us, Terms & Safety", make them normal.

2. From this page "http://localhost:3000/owner-benefits" remove "stars Owner Opportunity", "List Your Machine Now arrow_forward View Success Stories".

3 Add this page, and this page should be visible at the footer as a hyper link of every page "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\Feature Request.html". Just remove these parts from the page "Recent Ideas from the Community", "Explore Current Features", "Built for Maharashtra Farmers Bilingual Support Human Review", "Submit a Request".

4. Add this page when user wants to signout "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\signout.html". Just modify these things, the page is currently only for renter, but make this page for both renter and owner, so that only one such page exists for both owner and renter, so remove any renter information this page has.

5. Add this page as a forget password otp verification page: "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\forgetpasswordotp.html".

6. Add this page as a hyperlink at the footer: "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\report.html", just remove these form the page "Safety matters, Bilingual support, 24h Response Goal".

7. Remove this page "http://localhost:3000/support" and instead of this page, add this page "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\support.html", just remove the "Live Chat" and the "Search" from the support, and also add the real functional map in the page.

8. Remove this page "http://localhost:3000/rent-equipment" and instead of this page and any pages which makes query to this page such as this page "http://localhost:3000/rent-equipment?query=tractors", there are so many such pages, those pages also should be this page "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\avail-eq.html".

9. Remove this page "http://localhost:3000/rent-equipment?query=trolleys", and remove any such pages similar to this, and replace those pages with this page: "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\no-eq.html". Make the map functional.

10. Remove this page "http://localhost:3000/owner-profile" and all the pages linked to this page such as My Equipment, Bookings, Earnings, Settings and all other pages, after that add only this page as owner profile "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\owner profile.html", other pages I will provide later.

11. Remove this page "http://localhost:3000/renter-profile" and all the pages linked to this page such as Profile, Browse Equipment, My Bookings, Saved Equipment, Payments, Settings and all other pages, after that add only this page as owner profile "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\Renter profile.html", other pages I will provide later.

12. Remove this page "http://localhost:3000/owner-registration", and instead of this page, add this page "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\list-eq.html"

13. Delete this page "http://localhost:3000/equipment/4" and instead of this page, add this page "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\rent-eqs.html" and change any such pages which is relevant to this page into the new given page. Make the map functional.

14. At the footer in the Marketplace section, below How it Work, add a hyperlink called "Coming Soon" and kindly add this page ""C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\coming soon.html", just remove these form this page " agriculture MAHINDRA AGRI, account_balance, NABARD, eco TATA TRUSTS, verified_user ICAR". Make the map functional.

15. Instead of this page "http://localhost:3000/register", kindly add this page "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\create account.html"; just remove "Preferred Language / प्राधान्य भाषा English मराठी" from this page. Once the user click at the send otp, an another box should appear in this page to enter the OTP and besides it a button should appear to verify otp, once the otp verify button is clicked, it should either pop-up otp verified, or otp could not verified depending upon the situation.

16. Once the user verify otp in this page http://localhost:3000/register and fill all the details correctly as expected and click at the create account button, it should show "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\successfully.html"

17. Remove this page http://localhost:3000/forgot-password, and instead of this page, add this page "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\forgetpassword.html"

18. Instead of the current this page "http://localhost:3000/coming-soon", kindly add this page as it is, don't edit anything on your own "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\coming soon.html".

19. Instead of this page "http://localhost:3000/rent-equipment", kindly add this page "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\avail-eq.html" and in this new page when user clicks at the view details on any equipments, it should open this page "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\rent-eqs.html". This should follow by any subsequent pages which does the same thing with these pages.

20. At the footer, at the left side at the bottom write "© 2026 Kisan Kamai. All rights reserved." and the right side write "Built with ❤️ for Bharat."

21. In this page "http://localhost:3000/register" and in this page "http://localhost:3000/login", the login or create with google, the google icon should be colored.

22. Instead of this page "http://localhost:3000/forgot-password", kindly add this page "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\forgetpassword.html"

23. Remove this page "http://localhost:3000/rent-equipment?query=tractors" and add this page instead of this page "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\query-category.html". Then in this page, when someone clicks at the view details page, it should open this page for that particular item "C:\Users\hkuma\OneDrive\Desktop\16\rent-eqs.html". This should be followed by all such actions who does query in these pages.
